emails.subject: Re: broker fee
emails.body: We don't have fees on the BUY side of an EES sleeve this particular deal is the sale side. Unfortunately, Matt had scribbled something next to this deal that looked like "no bro" which usually indicates no fee, but it was actually ".015 bro." Anyway, that's probably more information than you needed.....sorry! Kate Kerri Thompson@ENRON 02/12/2001 02:26 PM
